calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF GENDER
Off Calendar Jul-26-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Gender and issuance of new birth certificate.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288

Petitioner Star Amerasu was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.

No objections to the proposed change of GENDER were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Gender from Female to Male to Female.
Order Changing Gender and issuance of new birth certificate was submitted to and signed by the Court

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF GENDER
Off Calendar May-15-2012 Off Calendar
